+    "title": "podman-container-tools: Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr: qemu-system-x86_64: cannot create PID file: Cannot lock pid file: Resource temporarily unavailable",
+    "description": "Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr: qemu-system-x86_64: cannot create PID file: Cannot lock pid file: Resource temporarily unavailable. This issue affects 8+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:\n```bash\npodman --version\npodman info --format json | jq .version\n```\nLook for error: `1 (30 days)`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-container-tools configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:\npodman fails to start\n\n**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**\r\n\n**Description**\n\n```\nError: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr: qemu-system-x86_64: cannot create PID file: Cannot lock pid file:"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr:…",
+        "description": "After a failed start, we can run into (somehow inconsistent) states where the machine won't start because a previous QEMU process is still running and the PID file is being used.  Stop didn't resolve the issue as this state wasn't detected.\n\nAllow to recover from this state by a) detecting it\n```yaml\nError: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr: qemu-system-x86_64: cannot create PID file: Cannot lock pid file: Resource temporarily unavailable\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1,… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that `1 (30 days)` no longer appears."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "After a failed start, we can run into (somehow inconsistent) states where the machine won't start because a previous QEMU process is still running and the PID file is being used.  Stop didn't resolve the issue as this state wasn't detected.",

+        "Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr: qemu-system-x86_64: cannot create PID file: Cannot lock pid file: Resource temporarily unavailable",
+        "Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr: qemu-system-x86_64: cannot create PID file: Cannot lock pid file: Resource temporarily unavailable",
+        "podman version\nCannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM\nError: unable to connect to Podman. failed to create sshClient: connection to bastion host (ssh://core@localhost:50422/run/user/502/podman/podman.sock) failed: dial tcp [::1]:50422: connect: connection refused"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
